hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by storing the age in a variable, e.g. let age = getAge()

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use if/else if/else to check the age ranges in order

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Check the youngest group first (age < 13), then work upwards

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The last group (seniors) doesn't need a condition — use else
